name: Autopilot Readiness Checker
description: Validates whether devices, profiles, and tenant configuration meet Windows Autopilot prerequisites before deployment. Ask me to run a pre-flight check on a device serial number.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Check if device serial ABC123 is ready for Autopilot deployment
Why would an Autopilot device get stuck on the Enrollment Status Page?
Are all apps in our ESP currently healthy?
